-- class.php --
<?php

namespace Foo\Namespace;

$x = $this::class;
$y = self::foo()->class;

// Apparently "Enum" as a name is allowed.
// The scanner demotes "Enum" to Ident after "class" via lastType.
class Enum implements \JsonSerializable
{
	const INTERFACE = 'Interface';

	public function jsonSerialize(): mixed
	{
		return null;
	}
}

// Keyword is allowed as a named param.
register(class: 'Enum');

// Keywords are allowed as enum case names.
enum Suit: string
{
	case Class  = 'class';
}

// Keywords in qualified names after "new".
$q = new Match();
